case.title: INTERNATIONAL NAV. CO. v. FARR & BAILEY MFG. CO.

opinion.h: INTERNATIONAL NAV. CO. v. FARR & BAILEY MFG. CO., 176 U.S. 684 (1900)
INTERNATIONAL NAVIGATION COMPANY, Petitioner, v. FARR & BAILEY MANUFACTURING COMPANY. No. 509.
Supreme Court of the United States

f.p: See 39 C. C. A. 197, 98 Fed. Rep. 636.[ International Nav. Co. v. Farr & Bailey Mfg. Co. 176 U.S. 684 (1900) ]
